methodsAttempted.query: site:uba.ar inteligencia artificial generativa Universidad de Buenos Aires uso enseñanza estudiantes política
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the UBA news article, Codigo UBA diplomatura chapter, CITEP Observatorio guidance, and faculty/course/news results.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uba.ar IA generativa CITEP Universidad de Buenos Aires orientaciones recomendaciones
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search identified the CITEP Observatorio La Brújul-IA page as the strongest official guidance source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:observatoriocitep.rec.uba.ar Brújul-IA Orientaciones IA Educación Superior
methodsAttempted.notes: Confirmed the CITEP IA collection and related official resources. The La Brújul-IA page retained the clearest source text for claim evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uba.ar integridad académica inteligencia artificial UBA reglamento resolución
methodsAttempted.notes: Did not find a university-wide binding AI academic-integrity regulation; only faculty or publication/course material appeared.
Reviewed the official CITEP IA collection. Student, campaign, and concrete-practices resources were considered, but claims were limited to the directly supported La Brújul-IA guidance.

artifacts.summary: Firecrawl discovery found one official CITEP/UBA guidance page with narrow evidence for teaching, integrity, classroom-use, privacy, and evaluation claims. Official UBA news, Codigo UBA diplomatura, and Filo faculty-course pages were rejected as announcement-, course-, or faculty-specific support.

artifacts.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior

artifacts.verificationNotes: Official CITEP/UBA Observatorio page with source-language guidance text on integrating AI into teaching, ethical use, classroom-use agreements, privacy, and evaluation.

artifacts.sourceTitle: IA generativa en la enseñanza universitaria: cierre de la primera edición del curso en Filo
artifacts.verificationNotes: Faculty news page describes a Filo course for faculty-specific teaching in humanities; it was rejected as faculty/course/news-only support.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Docentes de la UBA dieron el primer paso para la integración de la Inteligencia Artificial en la educación superior.
artifacts.notes: Official article documents an initiative and pending digital outputs, but the CITEP guidance page provides more direct evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Aprobar la Diplomatura en “IA y prácticas de enseñanza de nivel medio y superior”, elevada por la Secretaría de Asuntos Académicos de la Universidad de Buenos Aires.
artifacts.notes: Specific diplomatura/course approval was rejected for broad AI policy extraction; it may be useful only for a course/program-scoped record.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Esta iniciativa de la Secretaría de Asuntos Académicos fue diseñada para docentes de carreras de grado de nuestra facultad.
artifacts.notes: Faculty-specific course closure/news page was rejected because it does not establish university-wide policy or guidance.

targets.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior

stopConditions: Stop after verified official UBA/CITEP guidance supports narrow claims with Spanish source evidence.
Do not use news-only, faculty-only, course-only, or external embedded platform pages as direct policy evidence.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or non-JSON artifacts.

artifacts.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior es un decálogo que invita a repensar nuestras prácticas de enseñanza ante la irrupción de nuevas tecnologías, producido colaborativamente por docentes universitarios durante el Hackatón IA que organizó el CITEP. Ofrece claves conceptuales y estrategias concretas para una integración crítica y situada de la IA en la enseñanza.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: CITEP/UBA describes La Brújul-IA as a teaching decálogo with conceptual keys and concrete strategies for critical, situated AI integration.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.publisher: Centro de Innovación en Tecnología y Pedagogía, Universidad de Buenos Aires
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Es fundamental comprender la diferencia entre el uso legítimo de la IA como herramienta de apoyo y la apropiación indebida del contenido generado con ella. Enseñar el uso ético de esta tecnología debe incluir estrategias para la correcta atribución de fuentes y el reconocimiento de la cocreación con IA. Este enfoque se enmarca en la problemática de la integridad académica y propiedad intelectual.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance connects ethical AI use with avoiding improper appropriation, attributing sources, and recognizing AI co-creation.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior
citation.publisher: Centro de Innovación en Tecnología y Pedagogía, Universidad de Buenos Aires
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Para integrar efectivamente la IA al aula es fundamental explicitar reglas precisas sobre su uso, asegurando transparencia y responsabilidad académica. Las directrices claras permiten que los estudiantes comprendan los usos apropiados de la IA, cómo aprovecharla para mejorar su aprendizaje y qué límites deben respetar para garantizar la integridad de sus producciones.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance recommends precise classroom AI-use rules so students understand appropriate uses, transparency, and limits.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: La Brújul-IA: Orientaciones para la integración de la IA en la Educación Superior
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Además de su pertinencia didáctica, el uso de IA en educación debe considerar la protección de datos personales y la seguridad digital. No todas las herramientas de IA garantizan el resguardo de la información ingresada y es necesario elegir opciones confiables y concientizar a los estudiantes sobre los riesgos de compartir información sensible.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance says AI-tool selection should consider personal data protection, digital security, and risks around sensitive information.

artifacts.notes: Approved as narrow CITEP/UBA teaching guidance; not treated as a binding university-wide policy.
Approved because the Spanish source text directly connects ethical use with attribution, co-creation, academic integrity, and intellectual property.
Approved as guidance on explicit classroom AI-use rules and possible agreement contents, not as a mandatory institution-wide rule.
Approved because the source directly mentions personal-data protection, digital security, safeguarding entered information, and sensitive-data risk.
Approved as non-binding evaluation design guidance supported by the source text.

artifacts.title: Universidad de Buenos Aires CITEP AI Guidance Staged Review
artifacts.summary: This staged run found official CITEP/UBA guidance, La Brújul-IA, supporting narrow agent-reviewed claims about AI integration in teaching, ethical use and attribution, explicit classroom AI-use agreements, privacy and digital-security considerations, and AI-related evaluation design. The run does not identify a binding university-wide AI policy and does not mark any claim as canonical or human-reviewed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are limited to official CITEP/UBA guidance text and should not be read as binding policy.
Official news, faculty-course, and diplomatura/course-plan pages were rejected as direct policy evidence because they are announcement-, faculty-, or program-specific.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
